zh.Northampton, Northamptonshire, England: 英國諾薩普頓史爾諾薩普頓
zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir William de Lucy於1406年出生在英國諾薩普頓史爾時，他的父親Sir Walter Lucy20歲，母親Eleanor Archdeacon23歲。他於1424年之前與Margaret Neville結婚。他在美國喬治亞考維塔迪斯特利可特 8被列為knight of gainsborough, lincolnshire。他去世於1460年7月10日在他的家鄉享年54歲。

zh-hans.Northampton, Northamptonshire, England: 英国諾薩普頓史爾諾薩普頓
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir William de Lucy于1406年出生在英国諾薩普頓史爾时，他的父亲Sir Walter Lucy20岁，母亲Eleanor Archdeacon23岁。他于1424年之前与Margaret Neville结婚。他在美国乔治亚州考維塔迪斯特利可特 8被列为knight of gainsborough, lincolnshire。他去世于1460年7月10日在他的家乡享年54岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Lucy
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Irish and English: variant of   Lucey  .
French: habitational name from any of various places called Lucy, originally named with the Latin personal name Lucius + the locative suffix -acum.

variants.name: Lucey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Irish Maeve, Niall.

Irish: shortened Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó Luasaigh, an altered form of Mac Cluasaigh, a Cork name meaning ‘son of Cluasach’, a byname originally denoting someone with large or otherwise noticeable ears (from cluas ‘ear’).

nameMeanings.name: William
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir William de Lucy was born in 1406, in Northamptonshire, England, his father, Sir Walter Lucy, was 20 and his mother, Eleanor Archdeacon, was 23. He married Margaret Neville before 1424. His occupation is listed as knight of gainsborough, lincolnshire in District 806, Coweta, Georgia, United States. He died on 10 July 1460, in his hometown, at the age of 54.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir William de Lucy est né en 1406, à Northamptonshire, Angleterre, son père, Sir Walter Lucy, avait 20 ans et sa mère, Eleanor Archdeacon, avait 23 ans. Il a épousé Margaret Neville avant 1424. Sa profession de son indiquée est knight of gainsborough, lincolnshire à District 806, Coweta, Géorgie, États-Unis. Il est décédé le 10 juillet 1460, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 54 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir William de Lucy 1406 in Northamptonshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir Walter Lucy 20 und seine Mutter Eleanor Archdeacon 23. Er hat vor 1424 Margaret Neville geheiratet. sein Beruf ist als knight of gainsborough, lincolnshire in District 806, Coweta, Georgia, Vereinigte Staaten aufgeführt. Er starb am 10. Juli 1460 im Alter von 54 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir William de Lucy è nato il nel 1406 nel Northamptonshire, England, il suo padre, Sir Walter Lucy, aveva 20 anni e il suo madre, Eleanor Archdeacon, aveva 23 anni. Lui sposato Margaret Neville prima del 1424. La sua occupazione è indicata come knight of gainsborough, lincolnshire nel District 806, Coweta, Georgia, Stati Uniti d'America. Morì il 10 luglio 1460, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 54 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir William de Lucyが1406年にイギリスノーサンプトンシュアイアで生まれた時，父Sir Walter Lucyは20歳，母Eleanor Archdeaconは23歳であった。1424年以前にMargaret Nevilleと結婚した。アメリカ合衆国ジョージア州コウエタディストリクト 8での職業はknight of gainsborough, lincolnshireと記録されている。彼は1460年7月10日に故郷で54歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir William de Lucy(이)가 1406년 영국 노르섬프토실르에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir Walter Lucy(은)는 20세였고, 그의 어머니 Eleanor Archdeacon(은)는 23세였다. 그는 1424년 이전 Margaret Neville(와)과 결혼했다. 그의 직업은 미국 조지아 주 코우타 디스트릭트 8에서 knight of gainsborough, lincolnshire이었다. 그는 1460년 7월 10일 그의 고향에서 54세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir William de Lucy nasceu em 1406, em Northamptonshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir Walter Lucy, tinha 20 anos e sua mãe, Eleanor Archdeacon, tinha 23 anos. Ele casou-se com Margaret Neville antes 1424. Sua profissão aparece como knight of gainsborough, lincolnshire em District 806, Coweta, Geórgia, Estados Unidos da América. Ele faleceu em 10 de julho de 1460, em sua cidade natal, com 54 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir William de Lucy родился в 1406 г. в местности нортамптоншир, Англия, его отцу по имени Sir Walter Lucy было 20 лет, а матери, которую звали Eleanor Archdeacon, 23. Он женился на женщине по имени Margaret Neville перед 1424 г.  Он работал по профессии knight of gainsborough, lincolnshire в местности дистрикт 8, коуета, Джорджия, Соединенные штаты. Он умер 10 июля 1460 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 54 лет.
